## **2.2.2.G. PI #7**

### **What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?**

Implementation of additional RNP-AR approaches is increasing predictability for arriving traffic and hence improving vertical efficiency. In the autumn of 2025 parallel approaches (Established on RNP-AR + ILS) is planned for implementation. This could be a driver to improve both horizontal and vertical flight efficiency.
